channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bin room overflow, 1st June
item.description:
Bin room has spilled out onto the pavement causing vermin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): O'Reilly Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drug and alcohol litter, 1st June
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 30/05/26 Drug Paraphernalia Lat/Long - 51.4047999, -0.044085 what3words - remain.spell.descended Nearest address - 111 Clock House Road, Beckenham, BR3 4JU Drug and alcohol litter all around park benches dangerous for kids and dogs Reference - 5603572 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 30/05/2026 10:40 Drug and alcohol litter all around park benches dangerous for kids and dogs
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Betts Close, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 sets of flytiping been here over 2 weeks, 1st June
item.description:
Just saw a "highway maintenance" van drive down Thames Path 12:45 01/06/26 but maybe they're not looking to clear flytipping as they left it? These two spots have been here for 2 weeks. One is large, flammable, nitrous oxide cannisters and plastic bags on the grass next to the Thames Path; the other is half dismantled metal and glass furniture and polystyrene in the footpath between St Andrews Close and the Thames Path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Andrews Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 1st June
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 30/05/26 Other litter Lat/Long - 51.3887467, 0.0358628 what3words - trail.twins.garage Nearest address - The Crown, 155 Bromley Common, Bromley, BR2 9RJ Fly tipping bag of rubbish Reference - 5603329 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 30/05/2026 09:30 Fly tipping bag of rubbish
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 155, Bromley Common, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging branches, 1st June
item.description:
View for drivers exiting driveway is obscured. View of cars exiting driveway is obscured for drivers on the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Frensham Road, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass too long, 1st June
item.description:
Green infront 16 godstow road far to long grass when pavement is blocked by bins impossible to walk threw

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 1st June
item.description:
There is so much fly tipping on our road and also juts being dumped in our garden- no body takes their bins and it’s. Causing problems people let their dogs foul everyone where and no one picks it up - nothing is being weeded and the street looks untidy and unkempt - not worth the council tax

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aldworth Grove, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass on path of park, 1st June
item.description:
Broken glass on path and rubbish around bench in dickens field park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dickens Square, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 1st June
item.description:

Reference - 5602884 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 30/05/2026 01:13 Flytipped rubbish on pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 164, Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Two single beds dumped, 1st June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tweedy Road, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipped, 1st June
item.description:
Resident has called to report fly tipping outside 336 Rangefield Road. Please can this be looked into.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rangefield Road, Sundridge, Greater London

item.title: Bins flytipping today has NOT been resolved, 1st June
item.description:
Flytipping bins appearing on Road former report says resolved it has not please remove fly tipped bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pendulum Mews, Hackney, London

item.title: Shoes and stuff, 1st June
item.description:
Outside 38 Sutcliffe rd se18 2 ng shoes and other rubbish
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sutcliffe Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The lefthand side of the road (traveling north) has several potholes coming up to the light, 1st June
item.description:
Cyclists use this left hand side of the lane to bypass traffic, and it is very difficult to do so due to the sheer size of the potholes and uneven road - it is causing cyclists to have to re-join traffic as it is too dangerous to cycle on the left side.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Goswell Road, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Load of shoes, 1st June
item.description:
Outside 44 Sutcliffe rd SE18 2NG lots of shoes
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sutcliffe Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Area gets forgotten. In dire need of attention, 1st June
item.description:
Every year this area gets ignored and I have to complain. Put a complaint in 2 weeks ago - as yet still not resolved

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Millfields Cottages, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
